optimist: Weapon damage is increased by +{1}% for every {0}% ammo missing from the magazine.
rifleman: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +{0}% weapon damage for {1}s. Max stack is {2}. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

killer: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +{0}% critical hit damage for {1}s.
sadist: Amplifies weapon damage by {0}% to bleeding enemies.
unhinged: Grants +{0}% weapon damage at the cost of {1}% Stability and {2}% Accuracy.
strained: Gain +{0}% critical hit damage for every {1}s you are firing. Stacks up to {2} times.
eyeless: Amplifies weapon damage by {0}% to blinded enemies.
measured: The top half of the magazine has {0}% rate of fire and {1}% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has {2}% rate of fire and {3}% total weapon damage.
steady_handed: Hits grant a stack of +{0}% Accuracy and Stability.
ranger: Amplifies weapon damage by {0}% for every {1}m you are away from your target.
fast_hands: Critical hits add a stack of {0}% reload speed bonus. Max stack is {1}.
lucky_shot: Magazine capacity is increased by {0}%. Missed shots from cover have a {1}% chance to return to the magazine.
overflowing: Every {2} reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by {1}%.
perpetuation: Headshots grant +{0}% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply.
flatline: Amplifies weapon damage by {0}% to pulsed enemies.
preservation: Killing an enemy repairs {0}% armor over {1}s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional {2}%.
ignited: Amplifies weapon damage by {0}% to burning enemies.
determined: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed headshot.
nemesis_exotic: Aiming at an enemy marks them as your nemesis for 15s, letting you see them through walls.
pestilence_exotic: This debuff reduces healing received by 50% for 10s.
mosquito_song_exotic: Hitting an enemy applies a stack. Stacks are shared between players.
restrained_exotic: Deal 25% Amplified Damage for 20s after your Shield gets broken.
back_and_forth: Swapping to this weapon grants +{1}% Rate of Fire and +{0}% Weapon Damage for {2}s.
perfect_back_and_forth: Swapping to this weapon grants +13% Rate of Fire and +12% Weapon Damage for 10s.
cover_shooter_exotic: Every bullet fired while in cover increases Weapon Damage by 1% up to 1%. The bonus lasts for 15s.
payment_in_kind_exotic: Dealing damage to enemies adds a stack of +{0}% critical hit damage, up to {2} stacks, lasting {1}s.
unnerve_exotic: Killing an enemy will apply a mark on every enemy within 20m of it. Multiple marks can be applied to the same enemy. Max number of marks that can be applied to an enemy is 5. All marks on an enemy will disappear 10s after the last one has been applied.
pakhan_exotic: Each kill with this weapon gains a stack of 75% Base Magazine Size increase to the next magazine, up to 4 stacks.
transfusion_exotic: Hitting headshots builds stacks, up to a max of 8. When shooting an Ally or Skill, repair them for 50% of the weapon’s Total Damage value for each stack.
agonizing_bite_exotic: Diamondback randomly marks an enemy within {11}m. If no enemies are within {11}m, it marks the enemy closest to you.
doctor_home_exotic: Shooting an enemy with this weapon will apply a mark for {0} seconds.
ortiz_assault_interface_exotic: While scoped, the weapon will highlight a random body section of each enemy.
high_priority_target_exotic: Amplifies Weapon Damage by 1.25% to the highest ranking enemies currently in combat, as per the Tier hierarchy.
the_trap_exotic: Tags enemies when in crosshair (maximum of 10) If Agent kills any marked target with a headshot, all other targets will have 50% (20% PVP) movement speed decreased and receive burn for 10 seconds.
sandman_exotic: This debuff prevents the enemy from using armor kits and from receiving healing from any source.
capitulate_exotic: Hitting an enemy applies -4% Movement Speed for each pellet hit for 5 seconds. Shooting the enemy again will reapply the stacks.
perfect_stabilize: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot, up to 75%.
perfect_killer: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +90% critical hit damage for 10s.
perfect_pressure_point: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to enemies under Status Effects.
perfect_flatline: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.
perfect_streamline: Increase Weapon Damage by 37% when no Skills are on cooldown.
perfectly_ignited: Amplifies weapon damage by 30% to burning enemies.
perfectly_close_personal: Killing a target within 7m grants +38% weapon damage for 10s.
perfect_optimist: Weapon damage is increased by +4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.
perfect_precision_strike: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 2.
perfect_thunder_strike: Amplifies weapon damage by {0}% to shocked enemies.
perfect_preservation: Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 15%.
perfect_immobilize: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to ensnared enemies.
perfect_unwavering: Swapping to this weapon grants +4% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.
perfectly_measured: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and 38% total weapon damage.
perfectly_unhinged: Grants +22% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.
perfect_sadist: Amplifies weapon damage by 25% to bleeding enemies.
perfect_fast_hands: Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.
perfect_overwhelm: Suppressing an enemy grants +12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.
perfectly_steady_handed: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability.
perfect_soft_spot: Destroying a Weakpoint grants +32% Weapon Damage for 15s.
perfect_rifleman: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +11% weapon damage for 5s. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.
perfect_lucky_shot: Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 1% chance to return to the magazine.
perfect_perpetuation: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply.
perfectly_behind_you: Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.
perfect_ranger: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 3m you are away from your target.
perfect_eyeless: Amplifies weapon damage by 35% to blinded enemies.
perfect_brazen: Receive +3% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 6 pellets hit. Killing an enemy will provide +8% Amplified Damage on the next shot.
perfect_breadbasket: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 2.
explosive_delivery:
Whenever you throw a skill, 1.5 seconds after landing, it creates an explosion damaging enemies within 5m. 
Afterwards explosions will occur evey 5s.

Damage scales with skill tier dealing 25-100% damage of a concussion grenade. 

Occurs once per skill. 

Applies to Remote Pulse, All Turrets, All Hives, Explosive Seeker, Cluster Seeker, Mender Seeker, Decoy, All Traps.
kinetic_momentum:
When in combat, each skill generates stacks while active or not on cooldown

Each stack increases your total skill damage by 1.5% and total skill repair by 2%. 
Up to 15 stacks per skill.
Stacks are lost when skills go on cooldown.
gunslinger:
Weapon swapping increases total weapon damage by 23% for 5s. 
This buff is lost for 5s if you weapon swap while it is active.
focus: Increases total weapon damage by 5% (6%) every second you are aiming while scoped 8x or higher, up to 50% (60%).
spark: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases total weapon damage by 15% (18%) for 15s (20s).
obliterate: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10s. Stacks up to 20 (24) times.
intimidate:
While you have bonus armour, gain 3 stacks each second up to a max of 9 (10). Each stack increases total weapon damage by 4% to enemies within 10m.

All stacks are lost when you have no bonus armour.
headhunter_2:
After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 30s deals 125% (150%) of that killing blow’s damage in addition to it.
Damage is capped to 800% of your weapon damage. This is raised to 1250% if your headshot damage is greater than 150%.
empathic_resolve:
Repairing an ally, increases their total weapon and skill damage by 3-15% for 10s.
1-7% if self.

Effectiveness increased by your skill tier.
overwatch: After staying in cover for 10s (8s), increase your and all allies’ total weapon and skill damage by 12% (14%) as long as you remain in cover or in a cover-to-cover move.
glass_cannon:
All damage you deal is amplified by 25% (30%). 
All damage you take is amplified by 50% (60%).
spotter: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 15% (20%) to pulsed enemies.
unbreakable: When your armor is depleted, repair 95% (100%) of your armor. 60s (55s) cool down.
vanguard_2:
Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 45% (50%) of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies for 20s. 

Cooldown: 25s
protected_reload:
Grants +20% (40%) bonus armor while reloading. 
Grants 0%-18% (0-30%) of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies when they are reloading

Each blue core attribute adds 3% to the bonus armour
Maximum is 18%
entrench:
If you are below 30% armor, headshots from cover repair 20% of your armor.

Cooldown: 2 (1) seconds.
efficient:
Using an armor kit has a 50% (75%) chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

Requires 10 seconds to arm talent
mad_bomber:
Grenade Radius is increased by 50% (75%)
Grenade that kill an enemy are refunded.
Grenades can now be ''cooked'' by holding the fire button, making them explode earlier.
Gain 15% bonus armor while aiming grendes
braced: While in cover weapon handling is increased by 45% (50%).
skilled: Skill kills have a 25% (30%) chance to reset skill cooldowns.
tag_team:
The last enemy you have damaged with a skill is marked. 
Dealing weapon damage to that enemy consumes the mark to reduce active cooldowns by 6s. 

Cooldown: 4s
trauma:
Applies blind to an enemy hit in the head. Cooldown: 30 (20) seconds.
Applies bleed to an enemy hit in the chest. Cooldown: 30 (20) seconds.
tamper_proof:
Enemies that walk within 3m of your hive, turret, remote pulse, or decoy are shocked. 

Arm time: 2 seconds
Cooldown per skill: 10 seconds (8 Seconds)
reassigned:
Killing an enemy adds 1 round of a random special ammo into your sidearm.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.
combined_arms: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 25% (30%) for 3s.
tech_support: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 25s (27s).
shock_and_awe: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 20s (27s).
vigilance: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables this buff for 4s (3s).
versatile:
Amplifies total weapon damage for 10s when swapping between your primary and secondary weapons if they are different.

35% (45%) to enemies within 15m for Shotguns and SMGs
35% (45%) to enemies further than 25m for Rifles and MMRs
10% (20%) to enemies between 15-25m for LMGs and Assault Rifles.

At most once per 5s per weapon type.
unstoppable_force:
Killing an enemy increases total weapon damage by 5 (7)% for 15s. 
Stacks up to 5 times.

Grenade kills add 2 stacks.
companion: While you are within 5 (10) m of an ally or skill, total weapon damage is increased by 15% (20%) Perfect is on named CHEST item Only.
composure: While in cover, increases total weapon damage by 15%.
concussion:
Headshots increase total weapon damage by 10% for 1.5s. 5s with marksman rifles. 
Headshot kills increase total weapon damage by 15% for 10s.

Both buffs can be active for an increase of 25% total weapon damage
wicked: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20s (27s).
opportunistic_2: Enemies you hit with shotguns and marksman rifles amplifies the damage they take by 10% (15%) from all sources for 5s.
clutch:
When you are below 15% (20%) armor, critical hits repair 2.5% of missing armor. 
On kill, critical hits repair 2.5% of missing armor for 4 seconds.
Lowest possible repair is 0% armour

Each red core attribute adds 1 second to the time.
Maximum is 10 seconds.
safeguard: While at full armor, increases total skill repair by 130%.
bloodsucker: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +10% (12%) bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10.
leadership:
Performing a cover to cover grants 15% (20%) of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies for 10s. 
This is doubled (tripled) if you end within 10m of an enemy. 

Cooldown: 10s.
protector:
When your shield is damaged, you gain +5% and all other allies gain +15% of your armor as bonus armor for 3s. 

Cooldown: 3s.
adrenaline_rush_2:
When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 20% (23%) bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times.

Cooldown: 5s
galvanize: Applying a Blind, Ensnare, Confuse, or Shock to an enemy grants 40% (50%) of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 20m (30m) of that enemy for 10s
energize:
Using an armor kit grants +1 skill tier for 15s. 
If already at skill tier 6, grants overcharge. 

Cooldown: 60s (30s)
calculated_2: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 10% (15%).
overclock: You and allies within 7m (15) of your deployed skills, gain +25% (30) reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.2 (0.6) each second.
creeping_death:
When you apply a status effect, it is also applied to all enemies within 8m (10m) of your target. 

Cooldown: 15s (10s)
